variants.name: RPS Classic
variants.flavor_text: Rock. Paper. Scissors. Best of 3. Beat the AI. You know the drill.

variants.name: Quick Draw
variants.flavor_text: One round. One winner. The fastest RPS in the west.

variants.name: Pattern Pupil
variants.flavor_text: The AI repeats its last throw. We even told you. Training wheels for strategists.

variants.name: Counter Strike
variants.flavor_text: The AI throws what beats your last move. Think two steps ahead.

variants.name: Big Bang
variants.flavor_text: Rock Paper Scissors Lizard Spock. Five choices. More ways to win. More ways to lose.

variants.name: Elemental
variants.flavor_text: Rock Paper Scissors Fire Water. The elements have entered the chat.

variants.name: Marathon
variants.flavor_text: First to 7 wins. Long game. Statistics on screen. May the odds be in your favor.

variants.name: Streak Chaser
variants.flavor_text: Win 4 in a row. One loss resets the streak. Five lives. Choose wisely.

variants.name: Copycat
variants.flavor_text: The AI copies your last throw. Beat yourself. Existential crisis optional.

variants.name: Speed Round
variants.flavor_text: 30 seconds. Win as many rounds as possible. Fast animations. No time to think.

variants.name: Fragile
variants.flavor_text: Three lives. Lose three rounds and it's over. Win five to survive.

variants.name: Double Hands
variants.flavor_text: Throw two hands. See the AI's two. Remove one each. Mind games within mind games.

variants.name: Blind Double
variants.flavor_text: Double hands but you can't see the AI's cards. 5 seconds to decide. Bluff city.

variants.name: Battle Royale
variants.flavor_text: Three opponents at once. Beat the majority each round. Democracy is brutal.

variants.name: Time Traveler
variants.flavor_text: AI counters what you threw TWO rounds ago. First 3 rounds are random. Think in the past.

variants.name: Special Ops
variants.flavor_text: 35% chance of a special round. Double or nothing. Sudden death. Reverse mode. Chaos.

variants.name: Cycle Breaker
variants.flavor_text: The AI cycles R-P-S-R-P-S. Sounds easy. Three lives says it isn't.

variants.name: Elimination
variants.flavor_text: 3 opponents. If ANY of them hits 5 wins first, you're eliminated. Survive the arena.

variants.name: Glass Cannon
variants.flavor_text: 5-choice mode. Win 5 rounds. 2 lives. Ties cost lives too. Perfection or death.

variants.name: TOTAL WAR
variants.flavor_text: 5-choice blind double hands. 2 elimination opponents. Special rounds. 3 lives. Ties hurt. THIS IS WAR.
